notes.sg-myocardial-infarction-coronary-heart-: More specific term is coronary artery disease
notes.sg-myocardial-infarction-coronary-heart: This is a component of coronary artery disease, and is redundant with the relabeled 'coronary artery disease'. Merging.
notes.sg-myocardial-infarction-acute-coronary-: This is a broader category that includes myocardial infarction and unstable angina. It is a valid distinct topic.
notes.sg-myocardial-infarction-unstable-angina: This is a type of acute coronary syndrome, but is a distinct clinical entity and a valid child topic.
